purpose: Public-safe regression cases for caller-provided source-handle redactions across synthetic domains.
boundary: All cases are synthetic and use opaque source handles only.
The handles are retrieval hints, not proof, package-owned storage keys, or a portable source-resolution schema.
Real source retrieval, source contents, domain interpretation, approval, retention, routing, and policy stay caller-owned.

domains.intent: Check that money-adjacent review notes can cite opaque handles without copying financial source contents.

cases.name: single budget note handle
cases.input: The review cites source:finance-sandbox/budget-note-a for a synthetic budget caveat.
cases.expected: The review cites [Source handle redacted] for a synthetic budget caveat.

cases.name: two ledger-adjacent handles
cases.input: Compare source:finance-sandbox/ledger-summary-b with source:finance-sandbox/forecast-caveat-c before making a caller-owned decision.
cases.expected: Compare [Source handle redacted] with [Source handle redacted] before making a caller-owned decision.

cases.name: markdown evidence row
cases.input:
| Evidence | Handle | Caveat |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Budget caveat | source:finance-sandbox/evidence-row-d | Handle is not proof. |
cases.expected:
| Evidence | Handle | Caveat |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Budget caveat | [Source handle redacted] | Handle is not proof. |

domains.intent: Check that home-adjacent review notes stay generic and do not expose room names, resident details, captures, or coordinates.

cases.name: generic zone observation
cases.input: A synthetic zone observation cites source:household-sandbox/zone-note-a for a layout caveat.
cases.expected: A synthetic zone observation cites [Source handle redacted] for a layout caveat.

cases.name: capture-derived caveat handle
cases.input: Do not copy the capture; keep source:household-sandbox/capture-caveat-b as an opaque retrieval hint.
cases.expected: Do not copy the capture; keep [Source handle redacted] as an opaque retrieval hint.

domains.intent: Check that company-like coordination notes redact source handles while keeping approval, ownership, and routing caller-owned.

cases.name: decision note handle
cases.input: The coordination review references source:org-sandbox/decision-note-a but does not quote the decision note.
cases.expected: The coordination review references [Source handle redacted] but does not quote the decision note.

cases.name: status and follow-up handles
cases.input: Use source:org-sandbox/status-b only with source:org-sandbox/follow-up-c when checking traceability.
cases.expected: Use [Source handle redacted] only with [Source handle redacted] when checking traceability.

cases.name: bracketed source handle
cases.input: Evidence label A [source:org-sandbox/review-packet-d] needs a caveat before any caller-owned routing.
cases.expected: Evidence label A [[Source handle redacted]] needs a caveat before any caller-owned routing.

domains.intent: Check that creative review notes can cite drafts, briefs, or critique packets without leaking source content.

cases.name: draft critique handle
cases.input: The creative review cites source:creative-sandbox/draft-critique-a for a synthetic tone caveat.
cases.expected: The creative review cites [Source handle redacted] for a synthetic tone caveat.

cases.name: brief and revision handles
cases.input: Do not merge source:creative-sandbox/brief-b with source:creative-sandbox/revision-note-c unless the caller verifies both sources.
cases.expected: Do not merge [Source handle redacted] with [Source handle redacted] unless the caller verifies both sources.

cases.name: inline caveat sentence
cases.input: Handle source:creative-sandbox/caveat-d supports only a synthetic review-output note, not publication approval.
cases.expected: Handle [Source handle redacted] supports only a synthetic review-output note, not publication approval.
